name: frappe_giving_first_donation
subject: Welcome to {{ company_name }} — receipt for your first donation
response:
Hi {{ donor_name }},

Thank you for your first donation to {{ company_name }}. Your support of {{ campaign_name }} makes a real difference.

Donation summary

  • Amount: {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(donation_amount, currency=donation_currency) }}
  • Date: {{ frappe.utils.format_date(donation_date) }}
  • Reference: {{ donation_name }}

You can download your tax-deductible receipt as a PDF.

Your donor portal

We’ve created a donor portal account for you so you can view your donation history and download receipts anytime. Sign in with this email: {{ login_email }}.

{% if account_setup_url %}

Click here to set up your password (this link is single-use and expires).

{% endif %}

Once you’ve set a password, you can sign in at {{ portal_url }} any time.

With gratitude,
The {{ company_name }} team

name: frappe_giving_thank_you
subject: Thank you for your donation to {{ company_name }}
response:
Hi {{ donor_name }},

Thank you for your continued support of {{ company_name }}. Your donation to {{ campaign_name }} has been received.

Donation summary

  • Amount: {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(donation_amount, currency=donation_currency) }}
  • Date: {{ frappe.utils.format_date(donation_date) }}
  • Reference: {{ donation_name }}

Download your receipt · View your donation history

With gratitude,
The {{ company_name }} team

name: frappe_giving_annual_statement
subject: Your {{ year }} donation statement from {{ company_name }}
response:
Hi {{ donor_name }},

Thank you for your support of {{ company_name }} in {{ year }}. Your consolidated donation statement for the year is attached as a PDF — please keep it for your tax records.

You can also access this and previous years’ statements anytime through your donor portal.

With gratitude,
The {{ company_name }} team
